Serimizin 2. gününde Martı’nın kurucusu @oguzalperoktem ve @martiturkiye var.
Amerika’da gördüğü scooterları Türkiye’ye getirerek bir “mobilite devrimi” başlattı. Yetmedi, şirketini New York Borsası’na taşıyan ilk Türk oldu. 🇹🇷
Ama hikaye orada bitmedi. Bugünlerde onu iş dünyasındaki başarısından çok, TAG ile verdiği hukuk ve sokak mücadelesiyle konuşuyoruz.
Girişimcilik sadece para kazanmak değil, bazen de “değiştirmek” için risk almaktır. Daha fazla içerik için beni takip etmeyi unutmayın !!!
The insane behind the scenes of Cars! Want to see how it’s made? Follow!!!

Evet, bazen hepimiz karamsarlığa düşüp ne yapacağımızı bilemediğimiz zamanlar oluyor. Önemli olan, bu zamanlardan nasıl kurtulduğumuzdur. Buradan kurtulabilmek için gerekli olan tek şey ise kararlılığındır. 

Girişim serüvenimi döküyorum, haberdar olmak için beni takip et.

30 Gün, 30 Başarılı İsim serimizin ilk gününde kahve dünyasını baştan yaratan adam, Howard Schultz var.

Ondan Öğreneceğimiz 2 Altın Kural:
1️⃣ Asla “Hayır”ı kabul etme: Kapılar yüzüne kapansa da vizyonuna inanmaya devam et.
2️⃣ İnovasyon yapmayı unutma: Kahveyi sadece bir içecekten çıkarıp, bir deneyime ve kültüre dönüştürdü.
Gün 2’yi ve sıradaki başarı hikayesini kaçırmamak için TAKİPTE KAL!#başarıhikayesi
In case y’all didn’t know
Sıfırdan kendi girişimimi kuruyorum sende bu yolculuğu kaçırmamak için takipte kal !
Detaylı prompt listesini istiyorsan yorumlara 'Elon' yaz ve hemen beni takip et! 🚀 Unutma, beni takip etmezsen sistem sana mesaj gönderemiyor; linkin gelmesi için takip etmen şart.

RelyAi ile sohbetinin gidişatını ve karşındaki kişinin sana ilgisi olup olmadığını anında analiz et. Tıkandığın yerde “Açılış Cümlesi Al” butonuna bas, ilk mesaj için en etkileyici önerileri cebine koy!Uygulama yakında yayında. Haberdar olmak için takipte kal!!

Crispy chicken sandwich 🍔 

Ingredients 

For the chicken 

2 lb boneless chicken breast, cut into half and pounded to even thickness 
Salt to taste
1 tbsp smoked paprika powder
1 tbsp garlic powder 
1 tsp black pepper powder 

For the wet batter:

1 cup butter milk
Salt to taste
1 tbsp smoked paprika powder 
1 tsp black pepper powder 
1 tbsp garlic powder 

For the coating:
1 1/2 cups cornflakes, crushed
1 cup panko breadcrumbs 

For the dry batter:

1 cup all purpose flour 
1/3 cups corn starch

For the sauce 

1 cup mayonnaise 
1/3 cup buttermilk
1 tbsp hot sauce
Salt to taste
1/2 tsp onion powder 
1 tbsp garlic powder 
1 tbsp smoked paprika powder 
1/2 tsp black pepper 
1 tbsp pickle juice 
1 tsp honey

To assemble 

6 brioche bun
1/2 cup pickles 
Butter for toasting buns

Method :

Season the chicken with salt, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and black pepper.
Mix well so the seasoning coats all pieces evenly. Let the chicken rest for 10–15 min.

In one bowl, mix all-purpose flour and cornstarch. Coat the seasoned chicken into the dry batter:

In a bowl, combine buttermilk, salt, smoked paprika, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Mix until well combined. Add the chicken pieces and make sure they are fully coated.

In another bowl, combine the crushed cornflakes and panko breadcrumbs.
Remove the chicken from the wet batter and dredge it in the flour mixture, pressing gently so the coating sticks well.

Heat oil in a deep pan to 350°F (175°C).
Carefully add the coated chicken pieces.
Fry for 5–7 minutes per side, or until golden brown and fully cooked. Transfer to a wire rack or paper towel to drain excess oil.

In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, buttermilk, hot sauce, pickle juice, and honey.
Add salt, onion powder, garlic powder, smoked paprika, and black pepper.
Whisk until smooth and creamy.

Spread butter on the cut side of the brioche buns.Toast them in a pan over medium heat until golden.

Spread sauce on the bottom bun.
Place the crispy fried chicken on top.
Add pickles.Spread more sauce on the top bun if desired. Close the sandwich and serve.
#recipe #crispychicken #sandwich

Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation continues the animated comedy series by taking Dracula and his monster friends on a luxurious cruise designed especially for monsters. Hoping to give Dracula a break from running his hotel, Mavis surprises him with the vacation of a lifetime. During the trip, Dracula falls for Ericka, the ship’s mysterious captain, leading to humorous situations and adventurous moments as the monsters explore new locations and enjoy life outside the hotel.

The movie focuses on themes of family, love, and learning to relax and enjoy life. It highlights Dracula’s struggle to open his heart again while showing the strong bond between him and Mavis. With its colorful animation, fast-paced humor, and playful soundtrack, *Hotel Transylvania 3* delivers a lighthearted message about trust, change, and the importance of spending time with loved ones.

Tag your sister 😂

A sister is a female sibling who shares familial ties through birth, adoption, or blended family relationships. Beyond biology, the role often carries deep emotional significance, shaped by shared experiences, support, and evolving life stages. Key aspects of sisterhood can include companionship, rivalry, loyalty, and mutual growth. Today, the concept of a sister extends into chosen families and close friendships, reflecting broader ideas of connection, identity, and enduring personal bonds.

Ice Age: The Meltdown (2006), often called Ice Age 2, is the second movie in the Ice Age franchise. As the glaciers begin melting, Manny, Sid, and Diego discover that their valley will soon flood—forcing them to embark on a journey to higher ground. Along the way, Manny meets Ellie, another mammoth who believes she’s a possum, adding humor and heart to the adventure. With colorful animation, fast-paced comedy, and Scrat’s endless acorn chaos triggering even more disasters, The Meltdown delivers bigger action while highlighting friendship and belonging.

🎬 Death Note
2006 ‧ Horror ‧ 1 season

📜 Storyline
When brilliant high schooler Light Yagami stumbles on a mysterious notebook called the “Death Note,” he learns its terrifying power: any person whose name is written in it will die. At first Light plans to use this power to wipe out crime and build a better world, but his sense of justice quickly spirals into obsession. A genius detective known only as L steps in to catch the killer, setting off a chilling battle of wits and morals that questions what justice really means. 

🎞️ Title Info
📘 Death Note: Classic psychological anime that blends mystery, horror, and strategy like no other. 
📅 First aired: October 4, 2006 (Japan) 
📺 Seasons: 1 (37 episodes) 
🎬 Director: Tetsurō Araki 
✍️ Series composer/writer: Toshiki Inoue 
🎙️ Main cast (Japanese voices): Mamoru Miyano (Light), Kappei Yamaguchi (L), Shidô Nakamura (Ryuk), Aya Hirano (Misa) 
🎨 Animation studio: Madhouse 
🎵 Music by: Yoshihisa Hirano & Hideki Taniuchi 
⭐ IMDb rating: 8.9/10 
🍅 Rotten Tomatoes: 100% critics score 
📊 Genres: Anime, Mystery, Psychological Thriller, Supernatural, Crime 
🧠 Language: Originally Japanese (available dubbed and subtitled) 

📺 Where to Watch
Death Note is streaming with both subtitles and English dub on Netflix in the USA. You can watch the full anime series there, and it’s also often available for purchase or rental on digital platforms like Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV, and Google Play Movies. Check your streaming service to see current options and language availability.
